narrative:
Perry Twp. township has 4,315 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
